action.reasoning: Observation: Training was killed (exit code 137 = OOM/SIGKILL) after ~2 hours. Only 1 data point in training curves, meaning barely 1 epoch completed. No checkpoint was saved. Analysis: The training is too slow and likely OOM. Need to: (1) use DDP instead of DataParallel for better memory efficiency, (2) reduce batch size, (3) save checkpoints more frequently, (4) use gradient accumulation. Decision: Rewrite train.py with DDP, batch_size=2 per GPU, save checkpoint after each epoch, train for 3 epochs first to get a baseline.
